rationale: Cloud/full-stack engineer with no ML or IR experience; current role is at Dunder Mifflin (fictional company honeypot), and self-described AI exposure is limited to online courses and API experimentation with zero production ML work.

QA/DevOps background across 7.6 years with no NLP, IR, or ranking systems experience; Infosys stint and fictional-company roles (Dunder Mifflin) dominate, and top skills (dbt, Snowflake, Six Sigma) are entirely unrelated to the role.

3.5 years of applied ML (XGBoost, recommendation systems at Observe.AI, NLP pipelines) with pgvector and vector search skills, but experience is short of the 5-year threshold, lacks production retrieval/hybrid-search depth, and no NDCG/ranking evaluation ownership is evidenced.

NLP Engineer with 5.9 years who built a production semantic search system using sentence-transformers (bge-base) and FAISS over 500K documents at Rephrase.ai, plus recommendation systems at Adobe, with expert-level embeddings skills — directly matching the role's hard requirements.

Non-technical background spanning customer support, graphic design, and business analyst roles across 13.7 years; current role is at Stark Industries (fictional honeypot), and AI interest is purely curiosity-level with no engineering or ML work whatsoever.

Operations Manager with only 2.8 years of experience in a customer support team-lead role; self-described marketing background with zero ML or engineering skills, and AI exposure limited to ChatGPT experimentation.

Software engineer with 2.8 years entirely at Cognizant (IT-services firm) doing Android/mobile development; only AI exposure is self-learner online courses and a small RAG side project, with no production ML or IR experience.

Project Manager at Hooli with 3.3 years whose actual work history is mechanical engineering hardware design; marketing-manager background per summary, OpenCV as top skill, and no NLP/IR/ranking experience despite CS/AI graduate degrees.

Project Manager/Content Writer with 6.3 years split between brand/creative design at Globex Inc and TCS IT-services; skills are Tailwind, Six Sigma, SAP, and Accounting — zero engineering or ML relevance to a Senior AI Engineer role.

Customer Support and Business Analyst across 4.4 years at Wayne Enterprises (fictional honeypot) and Hooli with a marketing/demand-gen work history; recent AI curiosity (RAG courses, LangChain) with no production engineering foundation makes this a non-fit.
